# vendor CmakeLists.txt 

#open-cv
set(BUILD_LIST "core,imgproc,imgcodecs,highgui" CACHE STRING "Only build core modules")
# --- OpenCV Build Options ---
# Disable heavy/unnecessary modules to speed up build
set(BUILD_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_PERF_TESTS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_opencv_apps OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_opencv_python2 OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_opencv_python3 OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_DOCS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS OFF CACHE BOOL "Build as static for easier distribution")
set(WITH_IPP OFF CACHE BOOL "Disable IPP to fix submodule path issues")

add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/opencv)

unset(BUILD_TESTS)
unset(BUILD_PERF_TESTS)
unset(BUILD_EXAMPLES)
unset(BUILD_opencv_apps)
unset(BUILD_opencv_python2)
unset(BUILD_opencv_python3)
unset(BUILD_DOCS)
unset(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS)
